infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Coplate uses the camera to identify food on your plate.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Coplate uses your photo library so you can log a meal from an existing photo.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Coplate to use your camera to log meals.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Coplate to access your photos to log a meal from an existing picture.
